# III.PICS — AI Art Gallery & Midjourney Style Reference
# https://iii.pics
# Updated: 2026-04-07

## About
III.PICS is a free AI art gallery and Midjourney style reference hub.
We index 1,300+ Midjourney --sref style codes with visual previews,
11,000+ AI image prompts from top creators, and a growing AI video gallery
powered by Seedance 2.0.

## Key Pages

### Midjourney Sref Style Reference
URL: https://iii.pics/explore
Description: Browse 1,300+ Midjourney --sref style codes, each with visual previews.
Copy any sref code instantly and use it in your Midjourney prompts.

### AI Prompt Gallery
URL: https://iii.pics/gallery
Description: 11,000+ AI-generated images with their original prompts from NanoBanana Pro,
GPT Image 1.5, and Midjourney. Free inspiration for AI artists.

### AI Video Gallery (Seedance)
URL: https://iii.pics/seedance
Description: Playable AI video gallery generated with Seedance 2.0.
Includes text-to-video and image-to-video examples with original prompts.

### AI Image Generator
URL: https://iii.pics/create
Description: Generate AI images with multiple models: Gemini Flash, Imagen 4,
GPT Image 1.5, DALL·E 3, Wan2.7. Free daily credits, no signup required for browsing.

### Midjourney Sref Guide
URL: https://iii.pics/midjourney-sref
Description: Complete guide to Midjourney --sref style reference codes.
Explains how to browse, copy, and apply sref codes in Midjourney prompts.

### Seedance AI Video Guide
URL: https://iii.pics/seedance-guide
Description: Guide to Seedance 2.0 AI video generation.
Text-to-video and image-to-video examples with downloadable prompts.

### NanoBanana Pro Prompts
URL: https://iii.pics/nanobanana
Description: Gallery of NanoBanana Pro AI image prompts with visual results.

### GPT Image 1.5 Gallery
URL: https://iii.pics/gpt-image
Description: GPT Image 1.5 (OpenAI) generated images with their prompts.

## Content Policy
All AI-generated images are created by independent creators and community members.
III.PICS does not generate NSFW content. All content is family-safe.

## Data Coverage
- Midjourney sref codes: 1,300+
- AI prompt gallery items: 11,000+
- AI videos: 1,200+
- Daily updates: Yes
- Languages: English (primary), Chinese, Japanese

## Contact
Website: https://iii.pics
Twitter: https://twitter.com/iii_pics
